nasb.text: And He who was sitting was like a jasper stone and a sardius in appearance; and there was a rainbow around the throne, like an emerald in appearance.

esv.text: And he who sat there had the appearance of jasper and carnelian, and around the throne was a rainbow that had the appearance of an emerald.

cnv.text: 那位坐著的，看來好像碧玉和紅寶石，又有彩虹圍繞著寶座，看來好像綠寶石。

ccb.text: 闪耀着碧玉和红宝石般的光彩。有一道翡翠般的彩虹围绕着宝座。

csbs.text: 坐着的那一位，看起来仿佛碧玉和红宝石；又有一道彩虹围着宝座，看起来仿佛绿宝石。
